brief: Reject bookmark creation when a bookmark with the same URL already exists. Apply to POST /bookmarks and POST /bookmarks/import.
acceptance_criteria: POST /bookmarks returns 409 if URL already exists
POST /bookmarks/import rejects batch if any URL duplicates existing or within batch
Duplicate check is exact match on trimmed URL
Error response includes the duplicate URL
oracle_test: Create bookmark url=https://a.com. POST same url again, expect 409. Import [https://b.com, https://b.com], expect 400.
